feature_name: insert(s1, int pos, int nr, s2)
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, original_string VARCHAR(100));
UPDATE test_strings SET original_string = insert(original_string, 2, 1, 'XY') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT original_string, insert(original_string, 0, 2, 'ABC') AS modified_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, original_string) VALUES (2, insert('hello world', -5, 0, '!!!'));
